ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of device (e.g., thermostat, security camera) */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "device_state" TEXT /* Current state of the device (e.g., ON, OFF, temperature value) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the device is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the device's warranty expires */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware installed on the device */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the device (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type (e.g., thermostat, security camera) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the device manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "supported_channels" TEXT /* List of supported communication channels (e.g., Wi-Fi, Bluetooth) */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Average power consumption of the device */,
  "battery_life" REAL /* Expected battery life (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel (e.g., Wi-Fi, Bluetooth) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device type that uses this channel */,
  "max_data_rate" REAL /* Maximum data rate supported by the channel */,
  "security_protocol" TEXT /* Security protocol used by the channel */,
  "range" REAL /* Range of the channel in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_types" (
  "channel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel type */,
  "channel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel type (e.g., String, Switch) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel type */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data that can be transmitted (e.g., text, binary) */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value that can be transmitted */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value that can be transmitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_channels" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the channel */,
  "access_mode" TEXT /* Access mode of the channel (e.g., Read, Write) */,
  "last_access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the channel */,
  "access_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of access to the channel (e.g., number of times accessed per day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id", "channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenes" (
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scene */,
  "scene_name" TEXT /* Name of the scene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scene */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the scene */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the scene was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the scene was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the scene is active (true) or inactive (false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scene_devices" (
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scene */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device */,
  "device_state" TEXT /* State of the device in the scene (e.g., ON, OFF, temperature value) */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Order in which the device should be controlled in the scene */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the device should remain in the specified state (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scene_id", "device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "automation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for triggering the rule (e.g., time of day, device state) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action to perform when the rule is triggered */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the rule */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the rule was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the rule was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rule is active (true) or inactive (false) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the rule (higher number means higher priority) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_automation_rules_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_devices" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device */,
  "access_mode" TEXT /* Access mode of the device for the user (e.g., Read, Write) */,
  "last_access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the device */,
  "access_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of access to the device (e.g., number of times accessed per day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the device (e.g., ON, OFF, temperature value) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the state change */,
  "trigger" TEXT /* Event or condition that triggered the state change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who triggered the state change (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_states_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_states_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device */,
  "energy_consumed" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed by the device */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the energy consumption */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the energy consumption data (e.g., smart meter, device report) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of energy consumption (e.g., kWh, Wh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
